MOTION To Set Aside & Vacate Notice Of Entry Of Judgment & Judgment Releasing Liens
Off Calendar Jul-30-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Defendant DR. EDDIE C. WELBON in propria persona moving to set aside and vacate judgment
* Defendant WELBON represented in open court that notice of intent to argue was given. No appearance by the opposing party. Matter argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- Respondent EDDIE C. WELBON's motion to set aside and vacate is denied. Hon. JAMES J. McBRIDE (301/md); Court Reporter ERIC L. THRONE, CSR 7855

MOTION Amended Motion To Set Aside And Vacate; Notice Of Entry Of Judgment And Judgment Releasing Liens;
Off Calendar Jul-30-2002 Text Ruling

MOTION /Petition For Release Of Liens
Off Calendar Jun-04-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Robert Howard Peterson III, Esq. for Petitioner PLEASANT HILL MISSIONARY BAPTIST CHURCH moving for release of liens

Tentative ruling adopted -- Plaintiff's motion for release of lients is granted -- no opposition filed. Order signed in open court. (JJM) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855

MOTION /Petition For Release Of Liens
Off Calendar May-07-2002 Continued To Jun-04-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert H. Peterson, III, PETERSON & PETERSON, (415) 586-7460, appeared on behalf of defendants Pleasant Hill Missionary Baptist Church. Plaintiff Dr. Eddie C. Welbon, (415) 504-7813 appeared on his own behalf.

After argument, Plaintiff Pleasant Hill Missionary Baptist Church's Motion for release of liens was continued to June 4, 2002, so that moving party could re-notice opposing party and personally serve. (JJM/MD) Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR # 3620
